Title: Duplicate Advisory: phpseclib does not properly limit the ASN1 OID length
Description:
### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-f2qx-66wf-wvvx. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
An issue was discovered in phpseclib 1.x before 1.0.23, 2.x before 2.0.47, and 3.x before 3.0.36. When processing the ASN.1 object identifier of a certificate, a sub identifier may be provided that leads to a denial of service (CPU consumption for decodeOID).
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 1.0.0 before 1.0.23, all versions starting from 2.0.0 before 2.0.47, all versions starting from 3.0.0 before 3.0.36
NotImpacted: All versions before 1.0.0, all versions starting from 1.0.23 before 2.0.0, all versions starting from 2.0.47 before 3.0.0, all versions starting from 3.0.36
